variants.label: Reckless Full
variants.note: v60 full-size NNUE; strongest/current default, largest download.

variants.label: Reckless Full SIMD experimental
variants.note: Full-size NNUE built with wasm simd128 enabled; experimental opt-in benchmark target.

variants.label: Reckless Full browser API experimental
variants.note: Full-size NNUE with direct WASM exports; bypasses WASI/UCI text for lower adapter overhead.
